features.name: Waitlist email storage and capture API
features.description: Server-side endpoint and Postgres table that store submitted emails with company-scoped deduplication.

features.name: Landing page with email capture
features.description: One-page Next.js landing site on Vercel that lets a visitor submit an email to join the waitlist.

tasks.description: Define the Drizzle schema for waitlist_emails matching the CTO spec (id, company_id, email, source, created_at, unique(company_id, email)) and generate the migration.
Implement POST /api/waitlist: validate the email field, insert into waitlist_emails scoped by company_id, return { id, status: 'queued' | 'duplicate' } per the CTO contract.
QA: submit a valid email (expect 200 + status: queued), submit the same email again (expect status: duplicate), submit a malformed body (expect 400). Document results.
Set up a Next.js 14 + Tailwind project, configure Vercel deployment, and verify a placeholder page renders on the production domain.
Produce a layout spec for the landing page with hero, headline, single-field email form, primary CTA, and success/error states.
Implement the landing page UI per the design spec, including form validation, optimistic submit feedback, and success/error states wired to POST /api/waitlist.
